{{Quote|For Yabaley.|Klin-Fa Gi|<ref name="Emissary of the Void">"[[Emissary of the Void]]"</ref>}}
'''Klin-Fa Gi''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. She wielded a gold-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

==Biography==
[[File:Klin_and_Cilghal.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Klin-Fa Gi and Cilghal at the Conclave on Zonama Sekot.]]

Born on [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]], Gi was glad to escape offworld and join the [[New Jedi Order]], [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] alongside [[Yabeley]] and [[Bey Gandan]], both of whom developed attractions to her. Along with Gandan, she was presumed [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the [[Battle of Gyndine]], though in reality they survived, finding a [[qahsa]] filled with information on a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] plot to create anti-[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] weapons and destroy the [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] on [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]].

[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] hired [[Uldir Lochett]] and the crew of the ''[[No Luck Required]]'' to recover Gi, but she discovered the plot and escaped, fleeing to [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]]. Investigating Yuuzhan Vong activity there, she was captured along with her two male companions, and they were [[Torture/Legends|tortured]], with Yabeley dying. Lochett tracked her and helped free the other Jedi from [[Chom-Vrone]], and were able to flee off world. However, they discovered too late that Gandan had been injected with a poison that, when released, would kill the bacta-producing [[Alazhi/Legends|alazhi]]. After a long battle, Gi and Lochett killed Gandan and destroyed the virus.

She was one of the survivors of the war that was called to a [[Conclave on Zonama Sekot|meeting]] of the New Jedi Order on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] by [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] Skywalker.

{{Char-stub}}
